title: user — published macros
description: No Blueprint macros. The user module does NOT publish schema-level composition helpers — tenant / user FKs are added via the tenancy `Blueprint::tenantable()` macro (from tenancy module) and per-model composition. Two runtime macros are published on `Illuminate\Http\Request` for `me`-flavoured helpers on inbound requests.
namespace_note: Runtime macros extend `Illuminate\Http\Request`. Registered by `UserServiceProvider::boot()` during framework boot.

macros.name: Request::me
macros.description: Fluent alias for `$request->user('sanctum')`. Returns the authenticated Sanctum principal cast to `Academorix\User\Models\User` (via container binding) or null.

macros.name: Request::activeTenantId
macros.description: Returns the tenant ULID the caller is operating in for THIS request. Resolves in order: (1) the `X-Tenant-Id` header if the caller is a member; (2) the User's TenantMember row where `is_default = true`; (3) null if no default is set. The middleware `user.resolve_active_tenant` sets this once per request — the macro reads from the resolved value.

registration_order: Registered during the standard boot phase. Depends on tenancy having booted first so the User model's `BelongsToTenant` scope is already registered when the macros run — tenancy priority (14) < user priority (18) so ordering is safe by construction.
